articles.title: Ethereum Name Service Teams Up With Para Wallet to Simplify Registration
articles.description: Para wallet users can now sign up for an ENS name with just an email, phone number or social login.

articles.title: Ethereum’s Final Pectra Test Goes Live on Hoodi Network
articles.description: The final test, Pectra, has been launched on the Hoodi Network. Developers are set to schedule the main upgrade in 30 days if the test proceeds smoothly.

articles.title: Ethereum’s Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase – Will ETH Price Pump?
articles.description: This marks a critical phase before the upgrade is officially launched on Ethereum’s mainnet. If all goes well, developers expect Pectra to go live in the next 30 days. With Pectra’s final test in motion, …

articles.title: Cardano's (ADA) Imminent Game-Changing Upgrade in Spotlight: Details
articles.description: Upcoming upgrade expected to be game-changer for Cardano blockchain

articles.title: Why Chronicle, Ethereum’s first oracle, is raising a seed round seven years after launch
articles.description: Strobe Ventures led the round with participation from Brevan Howard and angels Rune Christensen, Andre Cronje and Stani Kulechov, among others.

articles.title: Standard Chartered Replaced Tesla with Bitcoin in its "Magnificent 7" Index, Achieving Better Performance
articles.description: Standard Chartered's hypothetical "Mag 7B" index, which swaps Tesla for Bitcoin, shows higher returns and lower volatility, highlighting Bitcoin's potential as a tech asset and hedge against traditional finance risks.

articles.title: Celo becomes Ethereum L2 with Optimism rollup implementation
articles.description: Celo, the blockchain network launched in 2020, has officially transitioned from a layer-1 chain to an Ethereum layer-2 protocol. Celo announced the successful transition in a March 26 X post, stating that “Celo is officially an Ethereum layer 2” protocol. In the thread, the organization claimed the new protocol features one-second blocks, sub-cent transaction costs, and Tether’s USDt (USDT) and USDC (USDC) as gas. Celo first proposed this transition in the summer of 2023, and it is now completed

articles.title: Fidelity Gears Up To Launch U.S. Dollar-Backed Stablecoin
articles.description: Fidelity Investments is preparing to roll out its own U. S. dollar-pegged stablecoin, marking a significant step forward in the asset manager's ongoing expansion into digital assets. read more

articles.title: 1.15 Million XRP in 24 Hours: $3 Ready?
articles.description: XRP getting ready for potential price surge with elevated on-chain activity through multiple days

articles.title: SEC Ends Probe Into Immutable With No Action Taken
articles.description: The SEC has closed its investigation into Immutable (IMX) with no enforcement action, marking a major legal win for the Web3 gaming platform.

articles.title: Ripple Plans U.S. Comeback After SEC Case Ends
articles.description: Ripple CEO says U. S. growth is back on track after winning SEC case, with plans to work with banks and expand crypto payments under Trump-era policies.

articles.title: XRP ETF Incoming? Analyst Says Ripple’s Legal Win Changes Everything
articles.description: The resolution of Ripple's four-year SEC lawsuit removes the key regulatory hurdle that had blocked XRP ETF approvals in the U. S.

articles.title: USDC stablecoin supply surpasses all-time high, topping $60 billion market cap
articles.description: USDC is distributed across multiple blockchains, with Ethereum holding the most at 36. 2 billion tokens, followed by Solana with 10 billion.

articles.title: Celo developers finalize Ethereum Layer 2 transition, nearly two years after initial proposal
articles.description: The Layer 2 development utilized the OP Stack from Optimism, migrating Celo into an optimistic rollup chain.
